acceptance_criteria.description: Coder prompt includes explicit target file path (e.g. 'Write the file: src/adapters/secondary/InMemoryTaskRepo.ts')
acceptance_criteria.verify: Inspect rendered prompt in hex-nexus logs — must contain 'Write the file:' with a concrete path

acceptance_criteria.description: Coder prompt includes project directory tree showing existing files and the target file marked with ← WRITE THIS FILE
acceptance_criteria.verify: Inspect rendered prompt — must contain 'Current project structure:' section with file listing

acceptance_criteria.description: Coder prompt includes available imports extracted from existing files' exports
acceptance_criteria.verify: Inspect rendered prompt — must contain 'Available imports:' section with concrete import paths and symbols

acceptance_criteria.description: Coder prompt includes hex boundary rules matching the target layer
acceptance_criteria.verify: Existing — already in get_boundary_rules(). Verify rules appear in rendered prompt.

acceptance_criteria.description: Coder prompt includes TypeScript strict mode instruction when language is typescript
acceptance_criteria.verify: Inspect rendered prompt for TS steps — must contain 'strict TypeScript' and 'import type' guidance

acceptance_criteria.description: Supervisor detects identical fixer output after 2 iterations via content hash comparison
acceptance_criteria.verify: Unit test: feed supervisor two identical fixer outputs → assert escalation triggered

acceptance_criteria.description: On fixer loop detection, supervisor escalates to higher-quality model
acceptance_criteria.verify: Integration test: mock model selector → assert upgrade_model() called after 2 identical hashes

acceptance_criteria.description: After model escalation still loops (2 more identical), supervisor regenerates from scratch with compile errors injected into coder prompt
acceptance_criteria.verify: Log output shows 'regenerating from scratch' message with compile errors included

acceptance_criteria.description: Worker rejects file paths containing newlines, carriage returns, or path traversal (..)
acceptance_criteria.verify: Unit test: paths with \n, \r, .., leading / → all rejected with error

acceptance_criteria.description: Worker rejects absolute file paths (starting with /)
